zh.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel是Armengol D'Urgell VI和Arsenda de Cabrera的兒子，於大約1125年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾。他於1157年與Dolça de Foix在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1184年8月11日在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達索爾斯納享年60歲，埋葬在西班牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel是Armengol D'Urgell VI和Arsenda de Cabrera的儿子，于大约1125年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾。他于1157年与Dolça de Foix在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1184年8月11日在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達索爾斯納享年60岁，埋葬在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Haitian: ornamental or topographic name, based on the Haitian Creole spelling of French ville (compare St. Vil ).

French and possibly also Haitian: shortened form of Ville, a habitational name from (La) Ville, the name of several places in various parts of France named with ville ‘settlement’. This surname is rare in France. It was brought to the US mainly from Haiti (see also 1 above).

variants.name: St. Vil
meanings: Haitian (mainly Saint-Vil):
ornamental name composed of two common French (and Haitian Creole) surname elements, saint ‘holy’ and vil ‘settlement’ (see Vil ); compare Vilsaint .

alternatively, perhaps a shortened form of French Saintville, a habitational name from Sainville (Eure-et-Loir), or an altered form of French Sainthuile, itself a respelled habitational name from Sainte-Olle (Nord). Compare also Saintvil and Sainvil .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valencia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Jesus, Manuel, Miguel, Armando, Francisco, Rafael, Jorge, Jaime.

Spanish; Catalan (València): habitational name from any of various places called Valencia (in Catalan: València), principally the major city in eastern Spain, which was formerly the capital of an independent Moorish kingdom of the same name, until it was reconquered in 1239 by James I, king of the Catalan dynasty, and became part of the Crown of Aragon together with the Principality of Catalonia and the Kingdom of Aragon. This city but also the other places were apparently named from an honorary title derived from Latin valens ‘brave’.

variants.name: Valenzuela
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Ruben, Javier, Jorge, Fernando, Mario.
Spanish: habitational name from any of the places called Valenzuela in Córdoba and Ciudad Real. The placename is a diminutive of Valencia (see   Valencia  ), literally ‘Little Valencia’.

variants.name: Valenciano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Jose, Enrique, Fernando, Ofelia, Placido, Alejandro, Alfonso, Arturo, Avelardo, Blanca, Carlos.
Spanish: habitational name for someone from any of various places called Valencia (see   Valencia  ).

variants.name: Valenza
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Mario, Sal, Alessandra, Antonio, Carmel, Cesare, Gasper, Gennaro, Gianfranco, Lorenzo, Onofrio, Celestino, Rosario.
Italian: habitational name from the Spanish city of València (see   Valencia  ) or from the Italian town of Valenza in Alessandria province.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Urgel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps from German Gurgel ‘throat’, a nickname for a drinker.

en.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel was born about 1125, in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalonia, Spain as the son of Armengol D'Urgell VI and Arsenda de Cabrera. He married Dolça de Foix in 1157, in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalonia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 11 August 1184, in Solsona, Lleida, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 60, and was buried in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel est né environ 1125, à l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne, fils de Armengol D'Urgell VI et Arsenda de Cabrera. Il a épousé Dolça de Foix en 1157, à l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 août 1184, à Solsona, Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Espagne.

de.San Bernardo, Valladolid, Castilla y Leó: San Bernardo, Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel wurde um 1125 in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien, als Sohn von Armengol D'Urgell VI und Arsenda de Cabrera geboren. Er hat 1157 in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien Dolça de Foix geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. August 1184 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Solsona, Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel è nato il circa 1125 nel l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna come figlio di Armengol D'Urgell VI e Arsenda de Cabrera. Lui sposato Dolça de Foix nel 1157, nel l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 agosto 1184, nel Solsona, Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgelは約1125年にスペインカタルニーアレイダル'ウルジェルでArmengol D'Urgell VIとArsenda de Cabreraの息子として生まれた。1157年にスペインカタルニーアレイダル'ウルジェルでDolça de Foixと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1184年8月11日にスペインカタルニーアレイダソルソナで60歳で死去し，スペインにて埋葬された。

ko.San Bernardo, Valladolid, Castilla y Leó: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 발라도리드 발버나 데 드로 산 베르나르도
ko.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel(은)는 대략 1125년 스페인 카털니아 레이다 '르그에서 Armengol D'Urgell VI(와)과 Arsenda de Cabrera의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1157년 스페인 카털니아 레이다 '르그에서 Dolça de Foix(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1184년 8월 11일 스페인 카털니아 레이다 솔소나에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel nasceu aproximadamente 1125, em l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha filho de Armengol D'Urgell VI e Arsenda de Cabrera. Ele casou-se com Dolça de Foix em 1157, em l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1184, em Solsona, Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Espanha.

ru.San Bernardo, Valladolid, Castilla y Leó: сан бирнардо, валбуена де дуиро, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel родился около 1125 г. в местности л'ургелл, ллида, каталуня, Испания. Его родителей звали Armengol D'Urgell VI и Arsenda de Cabrera. Он женился на женщине по имени Dolça de Foix в 1157 г. в местности л'ургелл, ллида, каталуня, Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 11 августа 1184 г. в местности солсона, ллида, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Armengaud VII de Valencia de Urgel nació aproximadamente 1125, en Urgel, Lérida, Cataluña, España como hijo de Armengol D'Urgell VI y Arsenda de Cabrera. Se casó con Dolça de Foix en 1157, en Urgel, Lérida, Cataluña, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1184, en Solsona, Lérida, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en España.
